text.title: Release Train Coordination Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: pin-window
step.action: Pick weekday + hour + duration; commit to repo.

step.name: write-freeze-rule
step.action: Define freeze start + duration + exception path.

step.name: enumerate-branches
step.action: List trunk / release / hotfix branches + merge rules.

step.name: schedule-rotation
step.decision-gate: Reject if any name appears twice.
